summary: Frontend-only testing for Mentor Global website. All 12 routes load, navigation/dropdown/mobile menu work, contact form validation (native + custom) works, form submits successfully showing Thank You message. 37/40 Playwright assertions passed (~92.5%); the 3 'failures' were flaky networkidle timeouts (pages actually render) and a test-side false positive on email validation (native HTML5 validation handled it before custom JS).
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: Custom email regex validation is redundant with native HTML5 type=email validation; both work but native UI shows tooltip while custom shows inline red text. Consider adding novalidate to the form to ensure custom validation messages are always shown for consistency.
Navbar.jsx: Mobile menu uses `fixed inset-0 top-16` which works, but body scroll is not locked when mobile menu is open. Minor UX issue.
All pages: networkidle takes >10s on /about and /team likely due to background images/fonts; not a functional bug but could affect perceived load performance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully functional. All 12 routes verified: /, /solutions, /solutions/{5 slugs}, /dexa, /subsidiaries, /about, /team, /contact. Tested at 1920x1080 desktop and 390x844 mobile. Navbar, solutions hover dropdown (5 items), mobile menu toggle, contact form validation (empty + invalid email + valid submission with Thank You), team leadership cards, footer all working. Browser native email validation triggers before custom JS for malformed emails - this is correct behavior. /about and /team have slow networkidle but render correctly with `domcontentloaded` wait strategy.
